name: Harrison Teachers
description_short: William Henry Harrison High School is a public secondary school in the Tippecanoe School Corporation in Indiana, not a financial services company.
description_long: William Henry Harrison High School is a public high school operated by the Tippecanoe School Corporation (TSC) in Indiana. The school serves grades 9-12 and is located in the Lafayette area. The institution provides traditional secondary education programming across multiple academic disciplines and support services. The website URL provided (https://hhs.tsc.k12.in.us/about-us/directory) points to the school's staff directory, which lists faculty and administrative personnel rather than any financial services offerings. The school offers standard educational services including instruction in English, Mathematics, Science, Social Studies, World Languages, Fine Arts, Career & Technical Education, and Special Education. Additional student support services include counseling, health services, and nutrition services. The staff directory reveals approximately 100+ employees including classroom teachers, special education specialists, counselors, support staff, and maintenance personnel. There is no evidence of any financial services, lending products, alternative credit offerings, or consumer finance activities. As a public K-12 institution, William Henry Harrison High School operates under standard school district governance and does not offer products or services in the consumer finance space. The miscategorization as a "payday-alternatives" provider appears to be a data entry error, as the school has no connection to financial lending, credit services, or cash advance products. This profile must be corrected immediately. The company should be recategorized as a public educational institution or removed entirely from a consumer finance database, as it is not a financial services provider and serves no function related to personal finance, lending, or credit products.
